description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly teal and dark gray body accented by orange highlights and metallic details. The receiver is topped with a prominent cylindrical component, possibly a futuristic sight or power cell, and the barrel is encased in a rectangular shroud with a glowing orange strip along the side. The stock is solid and slightly curved, finished in a wood-like texture, while the grip is ergonomic and integrated with a squared trigger guard. A red box-shaped magazine or battery is mounted below the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity or energy-based mechanism. The overall construction appears sturdy, with visible screws, vents, and reinforced sections, giving it a high-tech, urban tactical appearance.
description: A futuristic, teal and gray shotgun with orange accents, a solid stock, and a prominent barrel shroud featuring a glowing strip. It has a robust, tactical build with a red magazine or battery below the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal and gray body, orange barrel shroud, red magazine, and wood-textured stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, compact width, and the alignment of the barrel shroud.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the receiver, grip, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a rectangular shroud and a glowing side strip; no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel itself
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with a robust, reinforced appearance
